backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a Restaurant type and Map-based storage with functions to add restaurants and search by name or cuisine.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five Western Colorado rustic aesthetic updates across frontend CSS, Tailwind config, Layout, DirectoryPage, and RestaurantCard components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files describing the Western Colorado rustic theme implementation across components, pages, hooks, and configuration files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color variables defining a Western Colorado rustic palette for light and dark modes including desert sand, canyon red, and sage brush tones.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tags, title 'Mesa County Hidden Eats', and root div mounting the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: React application root setting up TanStack Router with QueryClient provider, root route with Layout wrapper, and index route rendering DirectoryPage.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout component with sticky header featuring Utensils icon and Mesa County branding, main content Outlet, and footer with copyright and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/RestaurantCard.t: Card component displaying restaurant details with placeholder image, name with serif font, cuisine badge, description, location with MapPin icon, and contact with Phone icon.
frontend/src/components/RestaurantList.t: Grid container rendering RestaurantCard components with loading skeletons and empty state message when no restaurants are found.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Search interface with text input for restaurant name filtering and Select dropdown for cuisine type filtering from predefined cuisine list.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, returning actor instance and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching restaurant data including searching by name and cuisine type using the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useRestaurantSearch.t: Combines name and cuisine search queries, merges results while avoiding duplicates, and applies combined filtering when both search parameters are present.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with a Western Colorado rustic color palette using OKLCH format, featuring warm earthy tones like desert sand, canyon red, and sage brush for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/DirectoryPage.tsx: Main directory page component featuring a hero banner, search interface, and restaurant list with search and cuisine filtering capabilities.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining custom color system using OKLCH format, typography with Lato and Merriweather fonts, and animation utilities for the Western Colorado rustic aesthetic.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking Mesa County Hidden Eats as a mobile-first restaurant directory with Western Colorado rustic aesthetic, documenting implemented features and architectural decisions.
